reference: Hello. Eye strain after a change of glasses might be due to overcorrection or undercorrection of glasses or improper spectacle frame placement and centration. So, you need to recheck your refraction and lenses to ensure they are dispensed according to your prescription. If you are having trouble with near vision or near work, then it might be due to presbyopia. Presbyopia usually starts at age forty, but some people might have problems after age thirty-five. Other symptoms like headache, neck tightness, and shoulder pain might be due to other causes like glaucoma. Therefore, you need a complete eye examination and intraocular pressure check along with the retinal examination. Your doctor might suggest a few investigations if required. You are most welcome to ask any queries.
text: Hello, eye strain after glasses might be due to overselection or underselection of glasses or improper spectacle placement and centration. So, you need to recheck your refractive lenses to ensure they are the strength according to your prescription. If you are having trouble with near vision or near work, then it might be due to presbyopia. Presbyopia usually starts at age forty, but some people might have problems after age thirty-five. Other symptoms like headaches, neck tightness, and shoulder pain might be due to other causes like glaucoma. Therefore, you need a complete eye examination and intraocular pressure check along with a retinal examination. Your doctor might suggest some investigations if required. You are most welcome to ask any questions.
